# Monthly Consolidation Table (MCT) - Report

**Role:** phn
**Purpose:** Consolidate approved BHS Summary Tables into a single city-wide monthly report that becomes the source package for downstream DQC, M1/M2 generation, and quarter-end Q1 compilation.
**FHSIS Reference:** FHSIS MOP 2018, Chapter 2 Table 2; Chapter 4.2 F.2, Chapter 4.3 F.2, Chapter 5 D.2, Chapter 6 E.2, Chapter 7 D.2, Chapter 8.2 E.2
**Who fills it:** Auto-generated by the system from approved STs; PHN reviews the consolidated totals, adds notes, and submits.
**Who reviews/approves it:** PHIS Coordinator reviews after PHN submission; downstream status changes continue through DQC/sign-off.
**Frequency:** Monthly. Generated after all required BHS STs are approved or after a documented partial-set decision.
**Storage location:** `monthly_consolidation_tables`, recommended child table `mct_indicator_rows`, recommended child table `mct_station_coverage`

## Required Fields

### MCT Header

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `mct_id` | UUID | Required. PK. | Maps to `monthly_consolidation_tables.id`. |
| `period_month` | INTEGER | Required. 1-12. | One city-wide MCT per month. |
| `period_year` | INTEGER | Required. Four-digit year. | Combined unique key with month. |
| `generated_by_user_id` | UUID | Required. FK to `user_profiles.id`. | Must be a PHN user. |
| `generated_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | Required. | Set when the MCT engine runs. |
| `source_summary_table_count` | INTEGER | Required. Must be >= 0 and <= 32 for current city setup. | Count of approved STs included in the run. |
| `expected_summary_table_count` | INTEGER | Required. Default 32 for CHO II setup. | Used to measure completeness. |
| `included_partial_set_flag` | BOOLEAN | Required. | `true` only when the PHN proceeds without the full expected set. |
| `partial_set_justification` | TEXT | Required if `included_partial_set_flag = true`. | Must explain why city consolidation proceeded despite missing BHS approvals. |
| `status` | ENUM | Required. `DRAFT`, `PENDING_DQC`, `APPROVED`, `SIGNED`. | PHN normally moves `DRAFT` -> `PENDING_DQC`. |
| `submitted_to_phis_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | Required when status reaches `PENDING_DQC` or later. | Supports deadline tracking. |
| `notes` | TEXT | Required as nullable field; can be blank string. | City-level narrative notes. |

### Station Coverage Snapshot

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `health_station_id` | UUID | Required. FK to `health_stations.id`. | One row per BHS expected in the period. |
| `health_station_name` | VARCHAR(150) | Required. | Snapshot label for audit. |
| `summary_table_id` | UUID | Conditional. Required if the station is included. | Links source ST. |
| `station_submission_status` | ENUM | Required. `NOT_SUBMITTED`, `SUBMITTED`, `RETURNED`, `APPROVED`, `EXCLUDED_PARTIAL_SET`. | Mirrors the PHN dashboard grid. |
| `station_included_in_mct` | BOOLEAN | Required. | Tells whether this BHS was counted in the MCT run. |
| `station_comment` | TEXT | Optional but present as nullable field. | Useful for excluded or late stations. |

### Indicator Rows

| Field Name | Data Type | Constraints / Validation Rules | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:-------------------------------|:------|
| `indicator_row_id` | UUID | Required. | Recommended child-table PK. |
| `indicator_code` | VARCHAR(100) | Required. Must match DOH/FHSIS naming exactly. | No local renaming. |
| `indicator_name` | VARCHAR(255) | Required. | Read-only standard label. |
| `program_cluster` | ENUM | Required. `family_health`, `infectious_disease`, `ncd`, `environmental_health`, `mortality_natality`, `morbidity`. | Include `morbidity` only if M2-source rows are surfaced in the same dataset. |
| `numerator_nhts` | INTEGER | Required when NHTS-disaggregated. Must be >= 0. | Sum of approved ST numerators across included BHS. |
| `numerator_non_nhts` | INTEGER | Required when NHTS-disaggregated. Must be >= 0. | Sum of approved ST numerators across included BHS. |
| `numerator_total` | INTEGER | Required. Must equal `numerator_nhts + numerator_non_nhts` where applicable. | Auto-computed. |
| `denominator_total` | INTEGER | Required for coverage indicators. Must be >= 0. | Based on FHSIS formula, city denominator, or summed denominators depending on the indicator. |
| `coverage_percent` | DECIMAL(6,2) | Required for coverage indicators. | Auto-computed. |
| `bhs_breakdown_json` | JSONB | Required. | Expandable per-BHS contribution map for audit and drill-down. |
| `city_average_percent` | DECIMAL(6,2) | Optional display field. | Useful for cross-indicator anomaly view. |
| `outlier_station_count` | INTEGER | Required. Must be >= 0. | Number of BHS with meaningful deviation from city pattern. |

## Optional / Conditional Fields

| Field Name | Data Type | Condition for Display | Notes |
|:-----------|:----------|:----------------------|:------|
| `interpretation_summary` | TEXT | Show when the PHN adds a city-level narrative before submission. | Optional in monthly workflow; more important at quarter end. |
| `recommendations_to_phis` | TEXT | Show when PHN wants to call out data issues before DQC. | Not part of the DOH template, but helpful for internal handoff. |
| `prior_month_coverage_percent` | DECIMAL(6,2) | Show when month-over-month comparison is enabled. | Helps explain unusual movement. |
| `variance_flag` | BOOLEAN | Show for indicators with station-level spread beyond threshold. | UI helper, not official DOH field. |
| `mortality_natality_source_notes` | TEXT | Show only if mortality/natality values are reconciled with LCR in the same cycle. | Helps document cross-source consolidation. |

## Enums / Controlled Vocabularies

- `status`: `DRAFT`, `PENDING_DQC`, `APPROVED`, `SIGNED`
- `station_submission_status`:
  - `NOT_SUBMITTED`
  - `SUBMITTED`
  - `RETURNED`
  - `APPROVED`
  - `EXCLUDED_PARTIAL_SET`
- `program_cluster`:
  - `family_health`
  - `infectious_disease`
  - `ncd`
  - `environmental_health`
  - `mortality_natality`
  - `morbidity`

## UX / Clinical Safety Concerns

- The PHN should always see how many BHS are included before generating the MCT; partial consolidation must never feel implicit.
- The generation step should show a confirmation gate summarizing:
  - approved ST count
  - missing/returned stations
  - whether the run is full-set or partial-set
  - deadline pressure for submission
- The MCT detail screen should support drill-down from each city indicator to the contributing BHS values.
- Indicators with coverage above 100%, mismatched subtotals, or missing disaggregation should be visually marked before PHN submission.
- Because MCT values become the basis for official reports, the PHN should not hand-edit numerators or denominators; only notes and governed exclusion/partial-set decisions should be editable.
- NHTS and Non-NHTS counts should be shown side by side, not hidden behind drill-down, because this is a mandatory validation dimension.
- Any BHS excluded from a partial run should remain visible in the UI so the city team does not lose track of the gap.

## Database Schema Notes

- Existing base table from `project_spec.md`:
  - `monthly_consolidation_tables(id, generated_by, approved_by, signed_by, period_year, period_month, status, indicators, dqc_log, approved_at, signed_at, created_at, updated_at)`
- Recommended normalized child tables:
  - `mct_indicator_rows(id, mct_id, indicator_code, indicator_name, program_cluster, numerator_nhts, numerator_non_nhts, numerator_total, denominator_total, coverage_percent, bhs_breakdown_json, outlier_station_count)`
  - `mct_station_coverage(id, mct_id, health_station_id, summary_table_id, station_submission_status, station_included_in_mct, station_comment)`
- `indicators JSONB` may still be kept as the canonical export snapshot, but normalized rows will make validation and analytics much easier.
- Indexes:
  - `monthly_consolidation_tables(period_year, period_month)`
  - `mct_indicator_rows(mct_id, indicator_code)`
  - `mct_station_coverage(mct_id, health_station_id)`
- `dqc_log` is downstream PHIS-owned but should remain nullable at PHN submission time.
- No hard delete for report artifacts; if regeneration before PHIS submission is allowed, supersede old drafts rather than deleting the historical record.

## Reports and Exports (if this form feeds a report)

- Feeds PHIS Coordinator DQC workflow.
- Serves as the source package for monthly official exports:
  - `M1`
  - `M2` if monthly morbidity is integrated at the city level in the same cycle
- Serves as source input for quarter-end `Q1` compilation across three approved months.
